_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld
Using 'goal' as the name of an option let you override some of the generated goal parameters
goal.description: How to End your Randomized playthrough.

filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage

description: If enabled, games will be unlocked individually
If disabled, you will obtain keys that unlock each column of games
Include completing songs perfectly as checks
Adds 50 very difficult checks, only enable if confident
Include completing songs blindfolded as checks
You must get an OK or better to send the check
Adds in the endless games as locations
You must hit a minimum score for each game to send the check
